productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch CH2573
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular case and backDial style: Black dialFeatures: A screw to reset time, a date aperture, 3 subdials, two push buttons to set the featuresStrap style: Black rubber strap secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Fossil hard case Warranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase
